name: chanmeng666-profile
description: Data-driven personal profile for Chan Meng. Single source of truth in data/profile/*.yaml; generates README.md, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and dist/profile.json.

scripts.build: npm run build:brand && node scripts/build.mjs && npm run build:linkedin
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate.mjs && node scripts/validate-brand.mjs && node scripts/check-linkedin-sync.mjs
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm run build && npm run audit
